1_validate_design_with_pydantic.validation_command_error: The installed noetl CLI does not expose a validate subcommand.

2_open_and_merge_ops_pr.cap_note: A second ops PR was required after the first post-merge smoke exposed NoETL Python exec helper-scope behavior: nested helper functions could not resolve system_prompt unless dependencies were bound as default arguments.

3_open_and_merge_docs_pr.verification: cd repos/docs && npm install && npm run build

5_smoke_openai_regression.flights_note: Amadeus returned an auth/friendly-error branch in this local environment, but the NoETL execution completed and rendered the widget.

6_smoke_anthropic_provider.blocked_reason: True Anthropic execution could not be validated because Secret Manager has no projects/1014428265962/secrets/anthropic-api-key/versions/1 and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is absent locally.

7_smoke_anthropic_fallback.secret_check: gcloud secrets describe anthropic-api-key --project=1014428265962 returned NOT_FOUND; no secret values were printed.

regressions_found.description: Initial post-merge OpenAI smoke recorded provider_error='openai NameError: name system_prompt is not defined'. Fixed in noetl/ops#57 by binding helper dependencies as default arguments for NoETL Python exec scope.
Anthropic true-provider smoke cannot run until an operator provisions projects/1014428265962/secrets/anthropic-api-key/versions/1 or updates workload.anthropic_secret_path to an existing secret.

notes: Repo implementation is landed: travel runtime now has unconditional anthropic_token keychain binding, a merged Python classify_intent provider switch, effective_provider telemetry, and tutorial 07 documents the switch.
OpenAI regression smokes passed through direct /api/execute because the local noetl exec catalog path ignored --payload/--set workload overrides.
Anthropic fallback smokes passed and proved provider_fallback_reason='anthropic token missing'.
The round cannot be called GREEN until an Anthropic API key secret is provisioned and at least help/flights/locations show effective_provider='anthropic'.
deferred_followups: Provision Anthropic Secret Manager entry projects/1014428265962/secrets/anthropic-api-key/versions/1, then rerun true Anthropic help/flights/locations smokes
Vertex AI provider — needs gcp_access_token keychain kind; design pass first
Ollama provider — needs in-cluster bridge URL; smoke once cluster has it
Audit table re-add as side effect inside each render_* python step
Phase 2: travel agent uses Amadeus MCP server internally
app:form widget for refining Amadeus filters before re-running
